text: A great place to get a healthy well balanced lunch close to the office with healthy gourmet wraps, paninis, sandwiches,  protein bowl,  soups,  salads,  and smoothies! They have a lot of healthy Mexican and Thai options. They have quesadillas, burritos, salsa,  and Mexican rice bowls.  I highly recommend the carnitas bowl, sesame Thai rice bowl, Thai red curry bowl,  southwest taco salad, Mediterranean salad,  southwest chicken soup,  Italian wedding soup,  spicy buffalo chicken wrap, fish taco wrap, Hawaiian crush smoothie with pineapple coconut and banana, survival kit with strawberry banana immune booster and protein booster.  They also do different hot lunches every day.  Some of my favorite hot lunches are tacos, Shepard's pie, cuban sandwiches, and orange chicken. My only complaint is I wish they stuck to the top 5 most popular lunches and just kept those for every week bc the hot lunches can be hit or miss. Prices range from $5.99 for wraps to $8 for salads and rice bowls or half sandwich with a soup or salad. For those unfamiliar, there is no table service. You have to walk up and get your order. There is plenty of free parking available. The ambiance is basic / casual. Location is in an office park off the memorial exit. The line can run out the door sometimes but usually doesn't take more than 10min to get food. The line really depends on that time you hit it. I usually come back 10min later if the line is bad.
